channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping and discarded cardboard, 1st July
item.description:
There’s a washing machine, a couple of estate agent signs and lots of discarded cardboard in the bins areas next to Barbrook house. They were discarded yesterday

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paragon Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped chair, 1st July
item.description:
Office chair , bags of clothing and various items dumped opposite 191 Ravensbourne Avenue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensbourne Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge dumped on pavement, 1st July
item.description:
Fridge has been dumped on the pavement restricting access

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London

item.description:

item.category: Dead animal in the carriageway or footway

item.title: Rubbish all over street not been swept in weeks, 1st July
item.description:
No street cleaning is being done in this area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oakmere Road, Abbey Wood

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: New waste every day, 1st July
item.description:
This is not being resolved. Put a bin here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 258, 270, Southwark Park Road, Bermondsey, Greater London

Still unresolved

item.title: Mattresses dumped, 1st July
item.description:
Could they be removed please? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Monnow Road, Bermondsey, Greater London

item.title: Please stop leaving bags here?, 1st July
item.description:
Opoosite no.25. Please take bags away and not leave here? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Monnow Road, Bermondsey, Greater London

item.title: Paint pots and rubbish items left outside no 4, 1st July
item.description:
This rubbish that's been dumped has been there for over 4 weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Rise, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of building material spillage, 1st July
item.description:
Building material from 1 Strandfield close works are ledt spilling across public path causing a hazard. This has been here for over 2 weeks with no action.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Drawell Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More dog poo, 1st July
item.description:
More dog poo in the alley joining Pincott Road with Latham road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Latham Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
